message:
fix(scheduler): add all_local_ready + wake_worker for local waiter routing

- Add `wake_worker(id)` to WorkerCoordinator for targeted unpark
- Add `all_local_ready` field to ThreeLaneWorker so execute() can route
  local waiters to their owner worker's non-stealable queue
- Add `local_ready` to ThreeLaneLocalCancelWaker to drain local_ready
  before promoting to cancel lane
- Replace `self.parkers.get()` with `self.coordinator.wake_worker()`
- Add test for local cancel removing from local_ready

Strengthens bd-1s3c0 (non-stealable local queue) with cross-worker
local waiter routing support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
